strategy: Hit Storm, +10%, and avoid Myth, which it resists 65%; prism if you are Myth.
Use Mass Feint, not a single Feint. A lone Feint gets Swap Warded back onto you, or protect it with Indemnity or dispel with Melt.
Keep your pip count at or below 7. Young Morganthe Mana Burns anyone who banks more, and do not cast shields while she is up, since they trigger her Earthquake.
Do not chase the summons. Killing them just brings more back, so funnel setup onto the Butterfly and burst it.
Do not slow-play. Broodmother heals the boss 15% every three Rounds.
cheatNotes: A late Wizard gets a two-turn Shadow Stun. Come in on Round 1.
It casts a Mass Shadow Empower for a Power Pip and hidden-switches first turn, so expect turn order to flip.
Placing a single Feint on it makes it Swap Ward the traps back onto the caster, so your Feint lands on you instead.
Melt can dispel that Swap Ward cheat.
Mass Feint does not trigger the swap, so use Mass Feint here.
Indemnity on your Feint also prevents the swap.
It summons Young Morganthe first; kill her and both she and Roberto return, then killing both brings all three back plus Broodmother. Do not chase the minions; focus the Butterfly.
Young Morganthe Mana Burns any Wizard who banks more than 7 pips. Hit before you overstock.
Any ward you cast makes her Power Nova, then Earthquake for 400 Myth to all enemies. Avoid shielding while she is up.
Every three Rounds Broodmother steals 15% Health from the Butterfly to heal itself.
That cheat is sometimes followed by a Dragonblade on an ally and a Mass -55% Tower Shield on their side.
